name: TikTok Shop platform qualification pack
change_note: Migrated from script PLATFORM_HINTS into a composable platform pack.
checklist_hints: Check official seller eligibility, category qualification, product listing, claims/content, and fulfillment requirements.
Separate cross-border seller route from local seller route.

requirements.requirement: Separate TikTok Shop local seller and cross-border seller routes and verify current official eligibility for the exact country site.
requirements.decision_effect: Wrong seller route or unsupported eligibility prevents approval.
requirements.notes: Seed platform requirement; country-site policies may differ.

requirements.requirement: Verify current category qualification, prohibited/restricted products, claims/content, and fulfillment requirements for the exact TikTok Shop market.
requirements.decision_effect: Unverified category eligibility or unsupported claims require more information or human escalation.
requirements.notes: Especially important for cosmetics, supplements, food, electronics, and household chemicals.

gaps: Seed pack: verify current official TikTok Shop policy pages per case before final decisions.
